# Q9 wildcard match keep nginx lines (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q9 wildcard match keep nginx lines.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter is_nginx = wildcard_match(line, "*nginx*") | filter is_nginx = true | fields line, is_nginx
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 4). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
